classifications.why: This is the only surface with enough bounded structure to justify a future allowlisted pilot, but only after stronger replay evidence.
Too close to complaint_unexpected_payment_dispute_v2 for a safe live pilot today.
Any live move would reopen frozen complaint-family routing boundaries.
Still explicitly deferred and too risky for live semantic arbitration.
Personalized eligibility and status-based free-care answers must remain bounded.
Admission, inpatient, and surgery access policy should remain symbolic unless phrasing is highly controlled.
Exact-name medicine coverage decisions should not be delegated to broad live reasoning.
Provider liability and accountability policy remains grounded and bounded.
Legal-basis answers must stay grounded and should not be produced by free semantic arbitration.
